form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 5th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on May 28 over 1200m, 4 len behind Victor Hugo with 57kg at $8. Can return in winning form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 5th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on May 28 over 1200m, 4 len behind Victor Hugo with 57kg at $8. Can return in winning form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together with Victor Hugo and bumped shortly after the start. Raced green.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At big odds at debut, 3rd of 16 at this track on February 18 over 1200m, 5 len behind Steamy Windows carrying 58.5kg at $41. Second-up 2nd of 13 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, neck behind Flamethrower carrying 58.5kg at $4.30. Gets his chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Raced two times to date. At big odds at debut, 3rd of 16 at this track on February 18 over 1200m, 5 len behind Steamy Windows carrying 58.5kg at $41. Second-up 2nd of 13 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, neck behind Flamethrower carrying 58.5kg at $4.30. Gets his chance.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign third of 8 at Greyville October 19 over 1000m, 1.1 len behind Mfethu with 59kg at $11. First up last campaign seventh of 11 at this track September 21 over 1200m, 11 len behind Chicarito with 60kg at $41. Expected to play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Resuming today after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign third of 8 at Greyville October 19 over 1000m, 1.1 len behind Mfethu with 59kg at $11. First up last campaign seventh of 11 at this track September 21 over 1200m, 11 len behind Chicarito with 60kg at $41. Expected to play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced green, hung in from the 300m.
As the start was effected, steadied to avoid the heels of Warofdynamite.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after a year 7th of 9 at this track on March 15 over 1000m, 10 len behind Fleur De Ling carrying 56kg at $9. Previously second-up second last of 14 at this track on February 2 2025 over 1200m, 12 len behind La Maddalena with 60kg at $101. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months 2nd of 9 at this track on March 15 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Fleur De Ling carrying 57.5kg at $11. Previously second-up 4th of 8 at Greyville on May 10 over 1400m, 2.25 len behind Shesha Ntombi carrying 56kg at $9. Among the top chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when second last of 16 at this track on December 14 over 1200m, 13 len behind Tladi Mothwana with 60kg at $101. Hard to enthuse.

form.formComment: First-starter by Act Of War out of Kailua Beach. Betting the best guide.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 11th of 13 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Kazenoyoni with 60kg at $5. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 4th in a small field at Greyville All Weather on February 23 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Blue Steel carrying 57kg at $9. Second run from a spell 4th of 10 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, 4 len behind Frostbite carrying 56.1kg at $21. Strong winning hope.
